text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Tsurutani Naoki <turutani@scphys.kyoto-u.ac.jp> reports libX11 builds 
OK after switching to Bison. 
[I'm not going to rebuild my X11 ports - I've seen way too much colateral 
damage from co-workers who are using the latest X11]
